name: github_list_concurrency_groups_for_workflow_run
description: List GitHub Actions concurrency groups associated with a workflow run or its jobs (GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/runs/{run_id}/concurrency_groups). Returns total_count and concurrency_groups (group_name, group_url, group_members). Cursor pagination via before/after. per_page 1-100 default 100, all_pages, max_pages. Classic tokens need repo scope for private repos. See GitHub REST Actions concurrency groups.
